rationale: The citing paper is an editorial coding review of 401 JMR articles (2013–2019), and the cited 2017 JMR social-media study could be either a coded sample article or just an illustrative topical citation. The available match is only one DOI-level reference (no in-text snippet or unstructured reference text), so there is not enough evidence to safely classify it as clearly incidental or clearly substantive.
